channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Europe faces jet fuel shortage in six weeks amid ongoing Iran conflict
item.description: Europe is facing a potential jet fuel shortage, with only around six weeks of supply left due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran. Fatih Birol, executive director of the International Energy Agency...

item.title: Abbott adjusts 2026 earnings forecast after Exact Sciences acquisition
item.description: Abbott Laboratories lowered its 2026 profit forecast following its US$23‑billion acquisition of cancer diagnostics maker Exact Sciences, which reduced projected earnings by about US$0.20 per share. Th...

item.title: Governor Abdullahi Sule Endorses Senator Aliyu Wadada for 2027 APC Governorship Ticket
item.description: Governor Abdullahi Sule of Nasarawa State don officially announce say Senator Aliyu Wadada na im preferred candidate for All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship ticket for 2027 election. This ann...

item.title: Museveni Did Not Advise Ruto to Harm Opposition Leaders, Social Media Graphics Fake
item.description: There has been a lot of talk on social media claiming that Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni told Kenyan President William Ruto to deal with opposition leaders using 'some lethal force.' These claims ...

item.title: Shifts in U.S. Political Support for Israel Amid Policy Controversies
item.description: The longstanding consensus of uncritical U.S. political support for Israel is undergoing a significant transformation. Historically, backing Israel was politically safe and reinforced across parties d...

item.title: Russian drone and missile strikes kill 16 in Ukraine, including a child
item.description: Ukraine experienced its deadliest assault of 2026 as Russian drone and missile strikes hit Kyiv and other cities, leaving at least 16 dead and dozens more injured. The attacks included the death of a ...

item.title: Delhi CM Highlights Benefits of Women Reservation Bill for Political Representation and Leadership
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta emphasised the importance of the Women Reservation Bill in promoting greater political representation and decision-making power for women during an interaction organis...

item.title: NNPP Clarifies It Is Not Part of ADC Coalition, Counters Atiku’s Claim
item.description: The New Nigeria Peoples Party (NNPP) don come out strong to clear misunderstanding wey dey around Atiku Abubakar statement say NNPP dey inside African Democratic Congress (ADC) coalition. For one inte...

item.title: Kenyan Crew Detained in Tanzania Pending Human Trafficking Investigation
item.description: Nine Kenyan seafarers are currently stuck in Kilwa, Tanzania, after their fishing vessel, FV Sea Mfalme, was impounded on March 30 over allegations of human trafficking. Tanzanian authorities have not...

item.title: Political Analyst Discusses Edwin Sifuna’s Potential Role in 2027 Elections
item.description: Talk of Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna possibly deputising former Vice President Kalonzo Musyoka in the 2027 presidential elections has sparked political debate. While Sifuna has not officially joined t...

item.title: EFF supporters clash with police on N4 after Malema jailed for firearm offence
item.description: Following the sentencing of Julius Malema to five years in prison for discharging a firearm in public, tensions flared in Mpumalanga as EFF supporters protested outside the High Court in KuGompu City....

item.title: Former Arsenal and Liverpool goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies in traffic accident
item.description: Alex Manninger, the Austrian former goalkeeper known for his time at Arsenal and Liverpool, has tragically died in a car accident at the age of 48. Manninger’s career spanned several top European club...

item.title: Australian Authorities Investigate Ruby Rose’s Sexual Assault Allegations Against Katy Perry
item.description: Australian police are currently investigating allegations of sexual assault against pop star Katy Perry, made by actress Ruby Rose. Rose, known for roles in 'Batgirl' and 'Orange Is the New Black,' cl...

item.title: Labour Chancellor Rachel Reeves criticised over defence budget dispute amid gender parity debate
item.description: Labour Chancellor Rachel Reeves has come under criticism for her approach to the United Kingdom's defence budget, amid claims that she is prioritising gender parity concerns over urgent military fundi...

item.title: Interpol Issues Red Notice Against Atong Ang Over Missing Sabungeros Cases
item.description: The Philippine Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla announced that an Interpol red notice has been issued this week against businessman Atong Ang, who is facing charges related to the disappearance of se...

item.title: Meghan Markle discusses online bullying during Australia trip with Prince Harry at mental health event
item.description: During a visit to a youth mental health organisation in Melbourne, Australia, Meghan Markle, the Duchess of Sussex, opened up about her experiences with intense online harassment. Speaking alongside h...

item.title: Rising Tensions: Death of Iranian Dissident in Canada Sparks Fears of Diaspora Political Violence
item.description: The death of Iranian activist Kavalar Masjoody in British Columbia has ignited fears and accusations within the Iranian diaspora, revealing a complex web of political tensions and potential threats. M...

item.title: Iran releases satirical AI video depicting Donald Trump amid rising tensions over the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A new Iranian propaganda video has portrayed former U.S. President Donald Trump as a Minion character battling unsuccessfully to open the Strait of Hormuz. The AI-generated clip, released by the Irani...

item.title: President Samia Pays Tribute to Bishop Mfumbusa for His Impact on Communications and Leadership
item.description: Tanzania's President Samia Suluhu Hassan has expressed deep sadness after the passing of Bishop Bernardin Francis Mfumbusa of the Catholic Diocese of Kondoa on April 14, 2026, at Benjamin Mkapa Hospit...

item.title: North Queensland Cowboys Take on Manly Sea Eagles in Round 7 Clash
item.description: The North Queensland Cowboys faced off against the Manly Sea Eagles in Round 7 of the 2026 NRL Premiership at Queensland Country Bank Stadium in Townsville. The match drew significant attention from r...
